# hetzner-robot_server_cancellation (Resource)

Schedules cancellation of a dedicated server (`POST /server/{number}/cancellation`). **Creating** this resource cancels the server; **destroying** it revokes the cancellation (`DELETE`). This is the destroy-counterpart to `hetzner-robot_server_order`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hetzner-robot_server_cancellation" "worker" {
  server_number     = 2093885
  cancellation_date = "now" # or "YYYY-MM-DD"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cancellation_date` (String) Cancellation date: 'now' or a date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `server_number` (Number) Server number to cancel

### Optional

- `cancellation_reason` (String) Optional cancellation reason

### Read-Only

- `cancelled` (Boolean) Whether the server is cancelled
- `earliest_cancellation_date` (String) Earliest possible cancellation date
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
